questionTextSource: What proofs may be necessary for cross-border road haulage services?
explanationSource: 3 answers are correct. As evidence for cross-border freight ECMT license, the bilateral authorization and the Community license shall apply.
answerASource: - ECMT permit
answerBSource: - bilateral authorisation
questionTextTarget: Sınır ötesi karayolu yük taşımacılığında hangi belgeler gerekli olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sınır ötesi yük taşımacılığında CEMT izni, ikili izin veya Topluluk lisansı gerekli olabilir.

questionTextSource: What is the correct response if, when reversing a combination vehicle the view to the rear is impeded?
explanationSource: If you drive backwards with a vehicle combination and your view is restricted to the rear, you must make sure that you do not endanger other road users. You should therefore be advised into traffic. This also applies to factory premises.
answerASource: If the line-of-sight is broken to the person directing, the vehicle must be stopped
answerBSource: A person directing is only required when driving into a priority road
answerCSource: A person directing is not needed when on a factory premises

explanationTarget: Yönlendiren kişiyi artık göremiyorsanız araç durdurulmalıdır. Geri giderken görüş engelliyse yönlendiren kişi gerekli olabilir; fabrika sahasında olmak bunu ortadan kaldırmaz.
answerATarget: Yönlendiren kişiyle görsel temas kesilirse araç durdurulmalıdır
answerBTarget: Yönlendiren kişi sadece öncelikli yola çıkarken gereklidir

questionTextSource: You are driving on a road with potholes and your trailer starts "jumping". What must you do?
explanationSource: You should not accelerate any further as this would cause the trailer to build up vibrations. Brake slightly instead. A reduced speed brings the trailer back under control.
answerASource: Reduce speed in order to avoid skidding
answerBSource: Accelerate to keep the combination of vehicles straight
answerCSource: Proceed at the same speed and avoid potholes
questionTextTarget: Çukurlu bir yolda gidiyorsunuz ve römorkunuz “zıplamaya” başlıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Römorkun kaymasını veya savrulmasını önlemek için hızınızı azaltmalısınız. Hızlanmak veya aynı hızda devam etmek tehlikelidir.
answerBTarget: Araç kombinasyonunu düz tutmak için hızlanmak
answerCTarget: Aynı hızla devam edip çukurlardan kaçınmak

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you want to use a trailer with overrun brakes behind your car?
explanationSource: Make sure that the breakaway cable is properly fastened. It has the effect that, in case of detachment, the trailer brake will automatically tighten and bring the trailer to a halt. The overrun brake has nothing to do with the maximum permissible speed.
answerASource: The actual total mass of the trailer must not exceed the towed load permitted for the car
answerBSource: The breakaway cable is connected to the towing vehicle
answerCSource: The permissible maximum speed for this combination of vehicles is 60 km/h, including on autobahns
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın arkasında atalet frenli römork kullanmak istediğinizde neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Römorkun gerçek toplam ağırlığı aracınız için izin verilen çekme yükünü aşmamalı ve kopma emniyet halatı çekici araca bağlanmalıdır. Bu kombinasyon için otoyolda genel azami hız 60 km/saat değildir.
answerATarget: Römorkun gerçek toplam ağırlığı, otomobil için izin verilen çekme yükünü aşmamalıdır
answerBTarget: Kopma emniyet halatı çekici araca bağlanmalıdır
answerCTarget: Bu araç kombinasyonu için otoyollarda da izin verilen azami hız 60 km/saattir

questionTextSource: What is designated as towed load?
explanationSource: Only the actually dragged load is called trailer load, in other words the weight of the trailer. The manufacturer sets this value for carrying a trailer.
answerASource: The actual load being towed
answerBSource: The permissible total mass of the trailer
answerCSource: The useful load of the trailer
questionTextTarget: Çekilen yük olarak ne adlandırılır?
explanationTarget: Çekilen yük, gerçekten çekilen yüktür. Römorkun izin verilen toplam ağırlığı veya faydalı yükü ile aynı şey değildir.

questionTextSource: You want to pull a trailer. When do additional rear-view mirrors have be to attached to your motor vehicle?
explanationSource: As a car driver you are responsible for a sufficient view of the vehicle. If visibility is compromised by a trailer and the prescribed mirrors are no longer sufficient, you will need to install additional mirrors.
answerASource: If it is not possible to observe all relevant road traffic situations without additional rear-view mirrors
answerBSource: If the load platform of the trailer exceeds a width of 1.5 m and a height of 1 m
answerCSource: If you are pulling a caravan or a trailer used in agriculture and forestry
questionTextTarget: Römork çekmek istiyorsunuz. Motorlu aracınıza ne zaman ek dikiz aynaları takılmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Ek aynalar olmadan ilgili tüm trafik durumlarını göremiyorsanız ek dikiz aynaları takılmalıdır.
answerATarget: Ek dikiz aynaları olmadan ilgili tüm trafik durumları görülemiyorsa
answerBTarget: Römorkun yük platformu 1,5 m genişlik ve 1 m yüksekliği aşıyorsa

questionTextSource: You want to tow a brake-equipped trailer. Where can you find details or guidelines on the permissible towable mass of your car?
explanationSource: The information on how much weight a towing vehicle can tow can be found in the registration certificate (part 1) and in the vehicle owner's manual.

explanationTarget: Azami dikey yük bilgisi kullanım kılavuzunda ve tescil belgesi Bölüm I’de bulunabilir. Tescil belgesi Bölüm II bu amaçla kullanılmaz.

questionTextSource: You want to pull a trailer. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: The manufacturer specifies how high the maximum drawbar load, the payload and the trailer load may be. If the values are not adhered to, it can have an effect on the driving behaviour and thus lead to an accident.
answerASource: - towable weight of the towing vehicle
answerBSource: - vertical load of the hitch
questionTextTarget: Römork çekmek istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çekici aracın çekilebilir ağırlığına, bağlantı dikey yüküne ve römork yüküne dikkat etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are driving with a trailer on a road with potholes. Your combination vehicle begins to swing up. What must you do now?
explanationSource: By reducing the speed, you can prevent skidding.
answerASource: - reduce my speed to avoid skidding
answerBSource: - accelerate to keep the combination vehicle in a straight line
questionTextTarget: Römorkla çukurlu bir yolda gidiyorsunuz. Araç kombinasyonunuz sallanmaya başlıyor. Şimdi ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Kaymayı önlemek için hızınızı azaltmalısınız. Hızlanmak veya ani karşı direksiyon tehlikeyi artırabilir.
answerBTarget: - araç kombinasyonunu düz tutmak için hızlanmak

questionTextSource: You want to hitch a trailer with a maximum authorised mass over 750 kg to your car. What must you ensure in this situation?
explanationSource:
In order for the trailer to be properly connected, the clutch claw must completely enclose the ball head. If the fuse snaps in, it is guaranteed that the clutch claw cannot dissolve independently. Check this with hand and eye. In addition, trailers with a permissible total mass of over 750 kg must also be secured with a tear -off rope. Check before driving as to whether it is appropriate.
After you have checked all the connections, you must also check the lighting before starting drive.
answerASource: That the handle of the ball coupling must be visually and mechanically checked
answerBSource: The breakaway cable is properly fitted
answerCSource: Following coupling, that the proper functioning of the trailer’s lighting system is checked
questionTextTarget: Azami izin verilen kütlesi 750 kg’dan fazla olan bir römorku arabanıza bağlamak istiyorsunuz. Bu durumda neyi sağlamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Küresel bağlantının kolu görsel ve mekanik olarak kontrol edilmeli, kopma emniyet halatı doğru takılmalı ve bağladıktan sonra römork aydınlatmasının çalışması kontrol edilmelidir.
answerATarget: Küresel bağlantı kolu görsel ve mekanik olarak kontrol edilmelidir
answerBTarget: Kopma emniyet halatı doğru şekilde takılmıştır
answerCTarget: Bağladıktan sonra römork aydınlatma sisteminin doğru çalışması kontrol edilir

questionTextSource: You are driving a car with a fully loaded trailer equipped with overrun braking. What special aspect should be noted here?
explanationSource:
So that the trailer does not roll away when you separate it from the towing vehicle, you should put on the pendant's parking brake. The trailer brake can overheat during longer downhill rides. In this case, you may have to take breaks when you leave.
The brake brake is only activated when the trailer on the towing vehicle. If you drive uphill, this may not be the case when braking, depending on how strong you brake.
answerASource: Longer downhill drives can cause the trailer brakes to overheat
answerBSource: The overrun brake system is ineffective on a vehicle combination in an uphill stationary position
answerCSource: The trailer’s parking brake must be activated before separating the vehicle combination
questionTextTarget: Atalet frenli, tam yüklü römorklu bir otomobil kullanıyorsunuz. Burada özellikle neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Uzun inişlerde römork frenleri aşırı ısınabilir. Yokuş yukarı dururken atalet freni etkisiz olabilir. Araç kombinasyonunu ayırmadan önce römork park freni çekilmelidir.
answerATarget: Uzun yokuş aşağı sürüşler römork frenlerinin aşırı ısınmasına neden olabilir
answerBTarget: Atalet fren sistemi, araç kombinasyonu yokuş yukarı dururken etkisizdir
answerCTarget: Araç kombinasyonunu ayırmadan önce römorkun park freni devreye alınmalıdır

questionTextSource: What should you note when driving a car after coupling a trailer caravan to it?
explanationSource: When overtaking, your overtaking path is extended by the length of the residential trailer. Since your vehicle accelerates less than the weight of the residential trailer, the overtaking path is also extended.
answerASource: - the overtaking distance is extended
answerBSource: - the acceleration capacity decreases
answerCSource: - when taking a left or right turn, the necessary cornering radius is reduced
questionTextTarget: Arabanıza karavan römorku bağladıktan sonra sürüşte neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Römorkla sollama mesafesi uzar ve hızlanma yeteneği azalır. Dönüşte gerekli dönüş yarıçapı küçülmez, genellikle daha fazla dikkat gerekir.
answerCTarget: - sağa veya sola dönerken gerekli dönüş yarıçapı azalır

questionTextSource: You hold a Class B driving licence. What trailer are you allowed to tow?
explanationSource: Drivers with a category B driving licence may carry a trailer with a maximum permissible mass of 750 kg. As long as the maximum authorised mass of the vehicle combination does not exceed 3,500 kg, the maximum authorised mass of your trailer may also be greater than 750 kg.
answerASource: - up to 750 kg
answerBSource: - over 750 kg, if the maximum authorised mass of the vehicle combination does not exceed 3,500 kg
questionTextTarget: B sınıfı sürücü belgeniz var. Hangi römorku çekebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: B sınıfı ile 750 kg’a kadar römork çekilebilir. 750 kg’dan ağır römorkta araç kombinasyonunun azami izin verilen kütlesi 3.500 kg’ı aşmamalıdır.
answerBTarget: - 750 kg’dan fazla, araç kombinasyonunun azami izin verilen kütlesi 3.500 kg’ı aşmıyorsa

questionTextSource: What can affect the driving stability of a towed trailer?
explanationSource:
The load of a trailer should be distributed so that the center of gravity is as close as possible to the axle of the trailer. This ensures optimal driving stability and controllability of the trailer.
A load center of gravity that is far back can have a serious impact on the driving stability of your trailer. This can cause the trailer to sway more easily during sudden steering movements or at higher speeds, increasing the risk of an accident.
If the tire pressure on your trailer is too low, it can affect the driving stability of your trailer. On the one hand, low tire pressure leads to poorer road grip, which makes your trailer more uncontrollable when cornering. On the other hand, low tire pressure leads to increased tire wear, which increases the risk of tire damage while driving.
A shock absorber that is already leaking can also have a negative impact on the driving stability of your trailer. The leaking shock absorber on your trailer loses its damping properties, which can lead to unstable driving behavior and dangerous situations that are difficult to control.
answerASource: A centre of gravity that is far back in the trailer
answerBSource: Insufficient tyre pressure in the trailer tyres
questionTextTarget: Çekilen römorkun sürüş dengesini ne etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Römorkta ağırlık merkezinin çok arkada olması, yetersiz lastik basıncı ve sızdıran amortisör sürüş dengesini olumsuz etkileyebilir.
answerATarget: Römorkta çok arkada bulunan ağırlık merkezi

questionTextSource: What is the maximum permissible weight of a trailer behind a truck of 10 t permissible total mass with continuous brake system?
explanationSource: A trailer behind a truck with 10 tons maximum permissible weight with a continuous braking system must not exceed 15 tons weigh.
questionTextTarget: Sürekli fren sistemli, izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 10 t olan kamyonun arkasındaki römorkun azami izin verilen ağırlığı nedir?
explanationTarget: Sürekli fren sistemiyle römorkun azami ağırlığı kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığının 1,5 katını aşamaz; 10 t için bu 15 t’dir.

questionTextSource: Which masses (weights) must be applied in a ratio for the calculation of the maximum permissible towed load behind a truck (continuous brake system)?
explanationSource: Here you have to calculate the maximum authorized mass of the truck to the actual mass of the trailer.
answerASource: Ratio of the permissible total mass of the truck to the actual mass of the trailer
answerBSource: Ratio of the actual mass of the truck to the permissible total mass of the trailer
answerCSource: Ratio of the permissible total mass of the truck to the permissible total mass of the trailer

explanationTarget: Sürekli fren sisteminde kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığı ile römorkun gerçek ağırlığı oranlanır.

answerCTarget: Kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığı ile römorkun izin verilen toplam ağırlığı oranı

questionTextSource: What is the maximum permissible towed load behind a truck (continuous brake system)?
explanationSource: The towable behind a truck must not be greater than 1.5 times the maximum mass of the truck to be.
answerASource: Not more than 1.5 times the permissible total mass of the truck
answerBSource: Not more than the permissible total mass of the truck
answerCSource: Not more than the empty mass of the truck
questionTextTarget: Kamyon arkasında sürekli fren sistemiyle azami izin verilen çekme yükü nedir?
explanationTarget: Azami çekme yükü, kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığının 1,5 katından fazla olamaz.
answerATarget: Kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığının en fazla 1,5 katı
answerBTarget: Kamyonun izin verilen toplam ağırlığından fazla değil

questionTextSource: What are the special features of semi-trailer trucks with short coupling systems?
explanationSource: Here you have to consider all the special features. The cornering characteristics of these trains differ from conventional road trains. The connecting device is subject to greater wear and the useful loading area is greater than in a comparable articulated with conventional connecting means.
answerASource: The cornering characteristics of these units are different from conventional articulated trucks
answerBSource: The coupling device is subject to a higher level of wear
answerCSource: The useful loading area is bigger than that of an articulated truck with a conventional coupling device

answerBTarget: Bağlantı tertibatı daha yüksek aşınmaya maruz kalır

explanationSource: If you want to Hitch a multiaxial trailer, you need the trailer from rolling away and there must be no people between the motor vehicle and trailer.
answerASource: The trailer must be secured against rolling away

answerASource: The electric coupling devices may not be damaged

explanationSource: Coming soon...

questionTextSource: A single-axle trailer has an actual gross weight of 600 kg. What is the minimum possible vertical load?
explanationSource: The bearing load is the mass that rests on the coupling device of the towing vehicle. To determine it, the car driver can place a piece of wood or a pipe underneath the coupling point of the trailer and place a bathroom scale underneath. The bearing load is displayed. The minimum load to be carried by the towing vehicle shall not be less than 4% of the trailer's total weight for trailers with a gross vehicle weight of not more than 3.5 tons. However, a minimum load of 25 kg is sufficient. In this example, the minimum support load is 24 kg. When loading the trailer, you, as a car driver, must be careful not to undercut or exceed the minimum and maximum permitted load. By shifting the load, you can influence the bearing load.
questionTextTarget: Tek akslı römorkun gerçek toplam ağırlığı 600 kg. Mümkün olan asgari dikey yük nedir?
explanationTarget: Asgari dikey yük gerçek toplam ağırlığın yüzde 4’üdür. 600 kg’ın yüzde 4’ü 24 kg’dır.

questionTextSource: You are driving an agricultural tractor with a maximum design speed of 40 km/h. You want to tow a type-approval-exempt trailer behind this tractor. What must you bear in mind here?
explanationSource: To increase the transport capacity, two trailers can be driven behind one tractor. The maximum permitted speed must not exceed 25 km/h and the trailers must be marked with a speed sign "25".
answerASource: The maximum permissible speed for this combination vehicle is 25 km/h
answerBSource: A “25” speed sign must be displayed on the trailer
answerCSource: The trailer must have its own registered licence plate

answerATarget: Bu araç kombinasyonu için izin verilen azami hız 25 km/saattir

questionTextSource: What is the maximum number of hours you are allowed to drive a truck with a total permissible mass of 16 t within 2 weeks?
explanationSource: A truck with a maximum mass of 16 t is allowed to draw just 90 hours over 2 weeks. The other two answers are wrong.
answerASource: 90 hours
answerBSource: 92 hours

explanationSource: Trucks with a total mass of 16 t have to make at least 45 minutes rest after 4 1/2 hours. This serves both to your, and others to protect road users. Please watch out for extensive periods.

questionTextSource: What is the maximum permissible time at the wheel per day when driving a truck with a permissible total mass of 16 t?
explanationSource: More than 56 hours a week you must not drive. Therefore, 9 hours twice a week and 10 hours right here.
answerASource: 9 hours, twice a week also 10 hours
answerBSource: 9 hours, three times a week also 10 hours
questionTextTarget: İzin verilen toplam ağırlığı 16 t olan bir kamyon kullanırken günlük azami sürüş süresi nedir?

answerATarget: 9 saat, haftada iki kez 10 saat de olabilir

You are combining a semitrailer motor vehicle with 5 axles (not combined traffic). The following vehicle data are known to you:

Semitrailer load/Vertical load (Truck tractor) = 16 t
Semitrailer load/Vertical load (Semitrailer) = 16 t
explanationSource: The operation of this combination is permitted if you t at least three renounce payload, because the total load is 43 tonnes. (34 + t 25 t - 16 t = 43 t).

questionTextSource: How do you determine the maximum authorised combination mass of a vehicle combination consisting of a towing vehicle with rigid drawbar trailer?

You calculate the total permissible towed mass using the following data:
Maximum authorised mass of the towing vehicle plus the maximum authorised mass of the trailer minus the drawbar load of the trailer, if this is greater than the maximum authorised drawbar load of the towing vehicle.
